LanguageData.Ammo_20x99mmRShVAK_AP.label: 20x99mmR ShVAK (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_20x99mmRShVAK_AP.description: Large caliber cartridge used by autocannons and a handful of anti-tank rifles.

LanguageData.Ammo_20x99mmRShVAK_Incendiary.descriptio: Large caliber cartridge used by autocannons and a handful of anti-tank rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_20x99mmRShVAK_HE.label: 20x99mmR ShVAK (AP-HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_20x99mmRShVAK_HE.description: Large caliber cartridge used by autocannons and a handful of anti-tank rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_20x99mmRShVAK_Sabot.label: 20x99mmR ShVAK (Sabot)
LanguageData.Ammo_20x99mmRShVAK_Sabot.description: Large caliber cartridge used by autocannons and a handful of anti-tank rifles.
